subcodes.first_line: Those loved ones of God who have turned from the Mosaic gulf towards the ocean of the Almighty Lord and the billowing waters of His Ancient Beauty
subcodes.first_line_orig: احبای الهی که از خلیج کلیم ببحر رب عظیم و طمطام جمال قدیم توجه نموده اند در
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @predictions and prophecies, @stories; anecdotes, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
